---
title: "ProQuest Dissertations & Theses Global"
page-layout: article
---

# ProQuest Dissertations & Theses Global

**Provider:** ProQuest

## Description

Comprehensive database of dissertations and theses from universities worldwide. Supports literature reviews, graduate research, and discovery of emerging scholarship.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Humanities & History, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://search.proquest.com/pqdtglobal/index?accountid=15172)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
